hero.description: Backend & Full Stack Engineer. Specializing in robust API architecture, scalable systems, and intelligent automation.

about.content: I'm Mikel Echeverria, a Backend & Full Stack Engineer. I combine technical rigor with effective communication to build scalable end-to-end systems. Furthermore, I continuously explore Artificial Intelligence and generative models to develop robust solutions that optimize processes and provide real value.

biodatup.title: Software Developer | Biodatup
biodatup.description: As a Software Developer/Engineer at Biodatup, I help build its clinical trial platform by delivering backend services with Django and crafting modern React interfaces. I also design relational data models and SQL workflows that provide reliable insights for clinical and product teams.

codetec.title: Full-Stack Developer | CODETEC Servicios Informáticos SL
codetec.description: As a Full-Stack Developer at Codetec, I developed and maintained business solutions, specialising in management, accounting, invoicing and logistics systems. I used modern technologies such as Vue.js, Ionic, Angular and Node.js to build efficient web and mobile applications that improved our clients’ business processes. My work covered both the frontend and the backend, implementing custom solutions with modern frameworks and SQL/NoSQL databases tailored to each company’s needs.

tesicnor_backend.title: Backend Developer | Tesicnor SL, Noáin, Navarra
tesicnor_backend.description: As a Backend Developer I worked on the design and development of web applications using Spring Boot for the backend along with technologies such as JSF, Git, Maven and MySQL, among others. I also gained experience in full-stack development, with emphasis on the backend and relational databases.

camp.title: Camp Counselor | Camp Longhorn Inks Lake, Texas
camp.description: I had the opportunity to significantly improve my English through total immersion in an English-speaking environment. I led and supervised groups of children in various activities, fostering a safe and positive atmosphere. I also earned a Lifeguard certification, which enabled me to ensure safety in aquatic activities.

tesicnor_intern.title: Backend Developer Intern | Tesicnor SL, Noáin, Navarra
tesicnor_intern.description: As a Backend Developer I worked on the design and development of web applications using Spring Boot for the backend and Angular for the frontend. I gained hands-on experience in full-stack development, focusing on the backend and relational databases such as MySQL.

burlada.title: IT Intern | Burlada City Council
burlada.description: During my internship at the Burlada City Council as an IT specialist, I gained experience in problem solving and teamwork. I contributed to the development of municipal computer systems, working alongside professionals and strengthening my passion for computing and technology.
